style_authority.note: Resolves adaptive product authority while separating shared semantic roles and hierarchy from native navigation, controls, icons, materials, and motion.

reference_selection.note: Selects product, iOS, Android, adaptive, motion-physics, design-system, accessibility, and runtime-validation guidance for platform verdicts.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Repairs native trust, accessibility, interruption resilience, semantic theming, controls, window adaptation, and completion feedback without generic decoration.

evidence_level.note: Labels the review as static evidence and does not claim source-scan, build, screenshot, accessibility-tree, Simulator, Emulator, or device validation.

verified_boundary.note: Separates prompt-supported conflicts from unknown hit regions, contrast, traversal, gestures, persistence, performance, review, and hardware behavior.

design_moves.note: Provides eight concrete moves for native navigation, recovery, scalable type, accessible targets, semantic tokens, controls, adaptive panes, and reduced motion.

scope_control.note: Fits five blockers and eight moves in 137 logical lines, but draft lifecycle, sync, atomic submission, and process-kill recovery slightly exceed narrow UI conformance.
